TestCase z26Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0) {
        int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
        follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    }
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Less than 2 elements, no subarray to shuffle, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule: shuffle a subarray within bounds randomly
    // Define subarray bounds
    int start = 0;
    int end = follow_case.n - 1;
    // Compute subarray length
    int length = end - start + 1;
    if (length <= 1) {
        // Subarray too small to shuffle
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Fisher-Yates shuffle on subarray follow_case.a[start..end]
    for (int i = end; i > start; i--) {
        // Generate random index j from start to i
        int j = start + rand() % (i - start + 1);
        // Swap follow_case.a[i] and follow_case.a[j]
        int temp = follow_case.a[i];
        follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[j];
        follow_case.a[j] = temp;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
